findings.title: Remove generated conversation transcript from the repository
findings.impact: The added .conversations JSONL file is not source, test data, or durable documentation; it embeds an implementation chat transcript with stale intermediate code and tool output. Keeping it tracked will pollute repository search, confuse future maintainers about the authoritative design, and grow maintenance noise unrelated to the client failover feature.
findings.fix: Remove the .conversations/8c2f0b5d-3e4a-4b9c-8d2f-1b3c4d5e6f70.jsonl file from the PR, and add or verify an ignore rule for local/generated conversation transcripts if this directory can be produced by tooling.

findings.title: Align tracker comments with fixed-window behavior
findings.impact: The new API documents windowLengthMs as a sliding-window duration, but RecordUrmaResult actually settles a complete fixed window by resetting windowStartTimeMs_ and exchanging the counters. The PR description and gflag docs also describe complete-window evaluation, so this comment gives future maintainers the wrong mental model when tuning or modifying failover behavior.
findings.fix: Change the comment to describe a fixed/tumbling statistics window, for example: '@param[in] windowLengthMs Fixed statistics window duration in milliseconds; a later request settles the previous full window.'
